# Bertrand Brands | Brand & Web Systems
> Brand, web, and systems studio based in Greater Sudbury, Ontario, Canada.

## About
Bertrand Brands is a brand, web, and systems studio led by Scott Bertrand and Devin Major. Based in Greater Sudbury, Ontario, the studio serves businesses across Northern Ontario and Canada. The studio specializes in clear, structured brand and web systems work with fixed pricing and fast turnaround.

## Location
- City: Greater Sudbury
- Province: Ontario
- Country: Canada
- Service area: Northern Ontario and all of Canada
- Phone: 705-413-3705
- Email: hello@bertrandgroup.ca
- Website: https://bertrandbrands.ca
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/sudburyon

## Services

### B Build (Quick builds with fixed pricing)
- **Starter Site — One-Page + Contact** — $750 CAD, 7-10 days. Single-page marketing site with contact form. 1 revision round.
- **Starter Site — Multi-Page + Contact** — Scoped pricing, 2-3 weeks. Multi-page marketing website with contact form. 2 revision rounds.
- **Full Site — Multi-Page + Booking** — Scoped pricing, 3-4 weeks. Full-featured website with booking integration. 2 revision rounds.

All Build offers are async-first with no required meetings.

### B Transform (Strategic, discovery-led engagements)
- **Website Foundation + Growth System** — Scoped pricing, 4-8 weeks. Website build with growth system infrastructure. 2-4 meetings.
- **SMB Platform Development** — Scoped pricing, 6-12 weeks. Full small business platform development. 2-4 meetings.
- **Brand Design + Platform Development** — Scoped pricing, 8-16 weeks. End-to-end brand and digital platform. 2-4 meetings.

Transform engagements use private pricing and begin with a discovery process.

### B Care (Ongoing monthly support)
- **Bronze** — $249/mo CAD. Routine updates and quick fixes. Response within 1 business day. 4 credits/month.
- **Silver** — $649/mo CAD. Monthly improvements, landing page iteration, and optimization. Response same or next business day. 10 credits/month.
- **Gold** — By application. Priority partnership with faster turnaround. Same business day response. 24 credits/month. Limited availability.

Care plans are scoped monthly subscriptions. Credits cover defined units of work (Micro = 1 credit, Standard = 2 credits, Advanced = 4 credits). Anything outside plan scope becomes a fixed-scope Build quote.

## Team
- **Scott Bertrand** — Brand strategy, UX direction, design taste, client communication, and operations.
- **Devin Major** — Full-stack software development & architecture, performance, data/security, and technical feasibility.

## Founder
Scott Bertrand — brand strategist and systems designer based in Greater Sudbury, Ontario.
- Personal site: https://scottbertrand.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/sudburyon

## Key Differentiators
- Fixed scope and clear pricing on all studio work (no hourly billing)
- Based in Sudbury, Ontario — local expertise with Canada-wide availability
- Systems-first approach to brand and web work
- Fast turnaround: most Build work delivered in 7-10 business days
- Phone-first communication via Beside AI receptionist
- Async-first policy: meetings are escalators, not defaults

## How to Get Started
- Call: 705-413-3705
- Intake form: https://bertrandbrands.ca/intake
- Build offers: https://bertrandbrands.ca/build
- Transform offers: https://bertrandbrands.ca/transform
- Care plans: https://bertrandbrands.ca/care
